_rationale_strip_lines: Go's `lci search` cmd unconditionally prints 'DEBUG: verbose=...' to stdout (cmd/lci/search.go:49) before the JSON body. Pre-strip via the runner's pre-parse strip_lines hook so json::parse sees a clean payload. We do not own the Go source; this is the cleanest cross-binary fix.
_rationale_shape: Each result element is wrapped in {"result": {...}} because Go's searchtypes.StandardResult has `Result GrepResult json:"result"`. C++ CLI was ported in iter-8 (src/cli/search.cpp) to emit the same wrapping plus relative paths plus `mode: standard` so the CLI wire format matches Go faithfully.
_rationale_file_id: results[].result.file_id is C++/Go scanner-ordering divergence — same reasoning as http/search descriptor. Mask it; path/line/column/match/score still verify content.
_rationale_context: results[].result.context.lines contains literal source bytes; trailing newline within the lines array is producer-specific (Go vs C++ extract_context windowing). Content equivalence verified via path/line/match/score; the surrounding context block is masked to keep the test focused on hit identity.
